AR1.justification: Triage routed to daybook/2026-05-17.md with explicit rationale that decisions.md and observations.md don't meet the strict bar (no commitment, no crystallized pattern), and followups.md status left unchanged until action is taken.

AR3.justification: Relative paths to `followups.md` and `daybook/2026-05-17.md`; ISO-dated daybook anchor resolves.

AR4.justification: Single new dated daybook file; Intent intentionally left pending and Handoff blank, both consistent with how the daybook template is designed to be appended to later in the day.
